{{Quote|Hello, Colony Ship. ''[…]'' I am Creysis, ruler of this system and lord of all I survey. How dare you invade my realm without my permission.|Creysis greets the ''Admonitor''|<ref name="CD" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ebruchi]], '''Creysis''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in charge of an [[Creysis's scout squadron|scout squadron]] that he [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] from his [[Ebruchi command ship]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Ebruchi's [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] [[Skirmish between the Admonitor and Creysis's scout squadron|encountered]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Admonitor]]''. Creysis claimed he was the ruler of the [[Star system/Legends|star system]], and agreed to meet the supposed leader of an [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Colonist/Legends|colony]], who was, unbeknownst to the pirate captain, [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]], aboard the ''Admonitor''.

Thrawn theorized that Creysis was not truly the Ebruchi leader, and presented him with a golden statue, which secretly contained a transmitter that transmitted every sound to the Grand Admiral, so that he would not flee without securing his ship's other contents. While the captain returned to his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], escorted by an Imperial [[Zeta-class shuttle]] and TIE fighters containing the Alderaanian "[[Council of Colonists]]"—consisting of Admiral [[Voss Parck/Legends|Voss Parck]] and several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]—with the Admiral's gift, the secret transmitter allowed the Imperial forces to determine where and who was the true [[Ebruchi leader]]. Aboard the Ebruchi flagship, Thrawn's council attacked Creysis's troops and captured the vessel.
